ceremony.inviteGodsDesc: Granny lights incense, inviting the gods
ceremony.declarationDesc: Declare to heaven and earth, reveal the villain
ceremony.feedTigerDesc: Feed raw pork to the white tiger to dispel evil
ceremony.dissolveDesc: Sweep away peanuts and sesame to dissolve misfortune
ceremony.burnOfferingsDesc: Burn gold paper to thank the gods
ceremony.divinationDesc: Toss blocks to confirm ceremony completion
ceremony.faceHint: Use a full face photo for best results
ceremony.customChantPlaceholder: Hit your villain XXX, make them OOO

battle.title: Hit the Villain
battle.tigerEvent: White Tiger appears! Feed pork for damage bonus!

chants.head: Hit your villain head, leave you breathless with dread
chants.face: Hit your villain face, no money for your disgrace
chants.eyes: Hit your villain eyes, leave them glazed in a daze
chants.ears: Hit your villain ears, eat dirt for all your years
chants.mouth: Hit your villain mouth, get smacked from north to south
chants.belly: Hit your villain belly, sued daily on the telly
chants.hands: Hit your villain hands, no love at your commands
chants.feet: Hit your villain feet, no shoes upon the street

tutorial.title: How to Play
tutorial.step1: ① Invite Gods — Light incense, invite deities to the ceremony
tutorial.step2: ② Declaration — Upload villain photo, add name & custom chants
tutorial.step3: ③ Hit Villain — Pick chants, weapons & moves to beat the villain!
tutorial.step4: ④ Feed Tiger — Random tiger appears, feed pork for bonus damage
tutorial.step5: ⑤ Dissolve — After defeating villain, dissolve bad luck
tutorial.step6: ⑥ Blessing — Pray for blessings and peace
tutorial.step7: ⑦ Burn Offerings — Burn gold paper to thank the gods
tutorial.step8: ⑧ Divination — Toss blocks to confirm ceremony completion
tutorial.tip1: Different chants have different effects: crit, def debuff, DoT, etc.
tutorial.tip2: Each weapon has unique damage — newspaper can multi-hit!
tutorial.tip3: Build up charge to unleash ultimate moves!

ui.tutorialDescription: Villain Hitting (打小人) is a traditional folk ritual from the Canal Road Flyover in Hong Kong. On the day of Jingzhe (Awakening of Insects), people hire a granny priestess to beat a paper effigy of their "villain" with a sandal, driving away bad luck and ill-wishers. The full ceremony has 8 steps, from inviting the gods to divination.
